source: Hidden Factors and Hidden Topics- Understanding Rating Dimensions with Review Text

concepts.finding: Combines LDA topic modeling with PMF. Each item has a topic distribution from its reviews. Item latent factor in PMF is augmented with topic vector. Enables interpretation of latent factors: each factor corresponds to a discovered topic. Improved rating prediction + explainable latent dimensions.
concepts.implication: Interpretable keyword intent dimensions via topic modeling: each intent dimension corresponds to a discovered topic (e.g., "price comparison," "product research," "troubleshooting"). Keywords associated with topics via LDA on search queries or documents.
concepts.open_question: Can LDA on search query logs discover interpretable intent dimensions that align with JTBD categories?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Topic-model-driven keyword embeddings (LDA + MF hybrid) produce more interpretable intent clusters than pure embedding methods while maintaining predictive accuracy.
